creator: leo@florida.sarang.net
text:
Since one local Perl module used in mrtg Perl script is missing after
        installation, the mrtg Perl script doesn't work.

Fix: Apply following patche to the /usr/ports/net/mrtg.
How-To-Repeat: 
        /usr/local/bin/mrtg /usr/local/etc/mrtg/mrtg.cfg

        will produce the error.
